chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 711 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Disposed of case For Non-prosecution of CMA No.3959/2024 (Restoration) 26.03.2025 Mr. Rab Dino Makwal, Advocate for the Petitioners >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the petitioners under instructions does not press the listed application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
